title: MYPAGE growth profile assets
summary: 34b/34c 성장 계약을 소비해 MYPAGE 프로필 영역 안에 등급/레벨/XP/대표 배지를 통합하고, badge/grade visual을 생성 이미지 concept 기반 SVG/CSS 컴포넌트로 적용하는 FE-only slice.
goal: 사용자가 MYPAGE 첫 화면에서 별도 게임식 카드 없이 자신의 집밥 등급, 레벨, XP 진행도, 대표 배지를 프로필 정보의 일부로 자연스럽게 확인하게 한다.

owners.codex: stage1 docs fallback, stage4 frontend implementation, stage5 design review, stage6 closeout

required_checks: pnpm vitest run tests/mypage-growth-profile.test.tsx tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/mypage-screen.test.tsx tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm vitest run tests/mypage-growth-profile.test.tsx tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/mypage-screen.test.tsx tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts

out_of_scope: Backend public contract or schema changes
New badge or quest definition expansion
GET /users/me progress or gamification field mixing
open_questions: Should user-selectable featured badges become a future contract-evolution candidate after 34d validates passive featured_badges display?
notes: Stage 1 docs prepared by Codex because Claude is rate-limited and the user asked Codex to orchestrate. Stage 2/3 are N/A. Stage 4 FE-only implementation on feature/fe-34d-mypage-growth-profile-assets passed targeted Vitest, targeted 34d/33c Playwright, authority/evidence validators, exploratory QA/eval score 97, workflow/workpack validators, diff check, and CI=1 pnpm verify:frontend:pr. The frontend PR smoke suite reported existing slice-06 and slice-10a mobile-chrome tests as flaky before passing on retry. Manual-only production Vercel/Supabase smoke remains follow-up.
